title: dorycnium herbaceum subsp. gracile
intro: Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. gracile is a subspecies of the bird's-foot trefoil plant, a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. gracile include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
